title: 637th Consecutive Common Stock Monthly Dividend Declared by Realty Income
text: SAN DIEGO , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Realty Income Corporation (Realty Income, NYSE: O), The Monthly Dividend Company®, today announced that it has declared the 637th consecutive common stock monthly dividend. The dividend amount of $0.2555 per share, representing an annualized amount of $3.066 per share, is payable on August 15, 2023 to stockholders of record as of August 1, 2023.

title: Will REITs Stand Up To A Recession? Brad Thomas With Kirk Spano
text: Real estate expert Brad Thomas discusses the potential of a recession and how real estate investment trusts (REITs) can be used as insulation and income generation during such a period. He advises avoiding the hotel sector and limiting exposure to retail, while recommending investment in net lease, industrial, cell towers, and data centers.
